title: Page 22
lines: Nuvoton Nu-Link Debug Adapter User Manual
Step: 5: Click the Settings button to open the Debug form, as shown in Figure 4-11. Refer to Table
4-1 for each setting description. The setting options shown in the Debug form may vary
depending on the type of the Nu-Link Adapter used.
Driver Version Display the Nu-Link Adapter driver version in the host
Chip Type Specify the Target chip type
Select Auto detect to reset the target chip
IO Voltage Specify the SWD port I/O voltage for the target chip; options include 1.8V, 2.5V,
Step 6: Invoke Project → Options for Target → Utilities, select “Nuvoton Nu-Link M0
Debugger” when the Use Target Driver for Flash Programming option is enabled, and
then select the Update Target before Debugging option, as shown in Figure 4-12.
